eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Montgomery, OH; at 5:25 PM on JUL 13, 2026 Effective until 6:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Missing endangered juvenile/suicidal. White female, black hair, blue eyes, 5'-5", 216lbs, last seen wearing white t-shirt with rips on the back, black and white checkered pants, carrying a camouflage backpack, wearing white headphones. Missing from the area near 300-block of S. Second St. in Miamisburg, OH., at approx 7:05pm If seen, contact the Regional Dispatch Center at 937-225-4357 and provide last known location and/or direction of travel.
